series_metadata.series_description: Journals used to log issuance of fiscal control numbers. Includes, but not limited to voucher and requisition control journals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain four (4) years, then destroy, provided audited by Auditor of State and receipt of report, if no federal funds are involved. If federal funds are involved, reteain an additional one (1) year, Paper: Wastepaper
